attempts.strategy: NEW reusable helper: deep algebraic core of Step 1 — two k-bar points (sections a,b of structure map wk) of a proper integral l.f.t. k-bar-scheme W into an affine V satisfy a≫g=b≫g. Proof: Γ(W) is a field (isField_of_universallyClosed), wk.appTop integral (isIntegral_appTop_of_universallyClosed), hence bijective (IsAlgClosed.ringHom_bijective_of_isIntegral) so wk.appTop is iso; both sections left-invert it on Γ, giving a.appTop=b.appTop via cancel_epi; ext_of_isAffine pins maps into affine V.
attempts.code_tried: theorem eq_comp_of_isAffine_of_properIntegral [IsAlgClosed kbar] {W} [IsIntegral W] (wk : W ⟶ Spec(.of kbar)) [UniversallyClosed wk] [LocallyOfFiniteType wk] {V} [IsAffine V] (g : W ⟶ V) (a b) (ha : a≫wk=𝟙) (hb : b≫wk=𝟙) : a≫g=b≫g
attempts.insight: cohomology-free realisation of 'global regular function on proper integral k-bar-variety is constant'. lean_verify: {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound} — axiom-clean. Every hypothesis load-bearing (auditor confirmed counterexamples for dropping IsIntegral / UniversallyClosed / IsAffine).

attempts.strategy: Reduce the residue-field-probe goal at a closed point x to a clean k-bar-point statement. Found Mathlib/AlgebraicGeometry/AlgClosed/Basic.lean (pointOfClosedPoint / residueFieldIsoBase / pointOfClosedPoint_comp) packaging 'closed point of l.f.t. k-bar-scheme ⇔ k-bar-rational point'.
attempts.code_tried: rw [← cancel_epi (Spec.map (residueFieldIsoBase wU x hxc).hom)]; suffices h : px ≫ U.ι ≫ f.left = px ≫ U.ι ≫ (lift (toUnit ≫ x₀) (snd) ≫ f).left by rw[hpx] at h; simpa [pointOfClosedPoint, Category.assoc] using h; set q := px ≫ U.ι; have hqsec : q ≫ (X⊗Y).hom = 𝟙 := by rw[hq,assoc]; exact pointOfClosedPoint_comp wU x hxc

Residual = geometric slice/section assembly (build ŷ section, IsIntegral X.left via retract, IsOpenImmersion.lift corestriction, two pullback hom_ext identities), then apply eq_comp_of_isAffine_of_properIntegral.
